messages.content: # Here are the things we do not offer Support for.

# ***Anything Non-No Hesi related we cannot offer support for!!!***
> **Browser support**
> **Steam support**
> **Computer hardware issues**
> **Personal Servers/Other Servers Unrelated to No Hesi**
> **PURE/SOL Filters & Configs**
> **Singleplayer Traffic**
> **Solo**
> **PC parts**
> **Car tuning**
> **Graphics & Paid filter settings**
> **PURE Install**
> **PAID MAPS**
> **Third-Party Apps**
> **Cars Not on our server lists**
> **Wheel Calibration Software, Logitech, Thrustmaster, Fanatec, Moza, PX etc**
> **Support for VR**

### Steam & Discord refunds are handled by the respective companies, Steam for Steam, Discord for Discord, go to their support for refunds, we do not handle them
